channel.title: Work-Life Balance on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Work-Life Balance on MinWeb

item.title: Don't Quit Your Job Before Using Your Vacation Days
item.description:
You’ve slogged through the year. You hit your deadlines, kept your cool, and banked every hour of vacation time on your balance sheet. Then, you decide it’s time to move on. You hand your manager your resignation letter and suddenly hit a wall: What happens to those three weeks of vacation I never took?

This frustration hits millions of workers every year. We tend to assume that since we “earned” those days, they belong to us just like money in a savings account. In reality, employment law is a mess—and more often than not, it’s a total loss for the employee.

item.title: Why "So What?" Is Not the Cure for Workplace Stress
item.description:
We’ve all been there. It’s 3:00 PM on a Tuesday. Your inbox is overflowing, your manager just added two more deliverables to your plate, and you can feel your heart rate climbing. You tell yourself to “just breathe,” but the anxiety doesn’t dissipate. It stays, humming in the background like a faulty fluorescent light.

A popular life hack suggests a simple mantra for these moments: just ask yourself, “So what difference does it make?”
